name: golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev
title: golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev
description:
low-level PostgreSQL database driver
Package pgconn is a low-level PostgreSQL database driver. It operates at
nearly the same level as the C library libpq. It is primarily intended to
serve as the foundation for higher level libraries such as
(https://github.com/jackc/pgx). Applications should handle normal queries
with a higher level library and only use pgconn directly when required for
low-level access to PostgreSQL functionality.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev because low-level PostgreSQL database driver.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-jackc-pgconn-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
